rulings.Case Title: MILA POPOV VS. SUNTRUST BANKS, INC. A GEORGIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 1. Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction. Continued to September 10, 2012 per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN CRAWFORD VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK NOW DOING BUSINESS AS JP et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and JP MORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend. See CCP 430.10(e) & (F). No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC, A DELAWARE VS. LYNN HAMBOLU et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT LYNN HAMBOLU's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to show fraud or mistake per CCP 473. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. SCOTT MORROW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT SCOTT MORROW's DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Defendant can't illegally violate other defendant's lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. SCOTT MORROW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT SCOTT MORROW'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant without leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. SCOTT MORROW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT SCOTT MORROW's MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant without leave to amend. New allegation after 3 day notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. RAFAEL SEGURA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SEGURA's MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant, without leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. RAFAEL SEGURA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SEGURA's DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1) Overrule as to illegal sublet; 2) Sustain as to nuisance. Five days to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. EDWARD HAMILTON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT EDWARD HAMILTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHING CHAU CHAN VS. ERLINDA HERBERT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 20, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT ERLINDA HERBERT's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
